draft_v1: {"schema_v":1,"recipe":{"title":"TRADITIONAL FRENCH ONION SOUP","description":"NOTE : If your pot doesn't have a heavy tight-fitting lid, place a layer of aluminum foil over the pot, crimping the edges to seal tightly, then add the lid.","yield_phrase":"4"},"steps":[{"instruction":"1. Melt the butter in a large Dutch oven over medium heat. Add the onions and 1 teaspoon salt and cook, stirring frequently with a wooden spoon, until the onions have begun to soften and settled into the bottom of the pot, about 5 minutes. Cover the pot with a tight-fitting lid (see Note above), reduce the heat to the lowest setting, and cook, stirring every 45 minutes, until the onions are completely tender, about 2 hours.","ingredient_lines":[{"raw_ingredient_text":"4 tablespoons unsalted butter"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"5 pounds yellow onions (about 5 large), finely sliced (about 71/2 cups)"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"Kosher salt"}]},{"instruction":"2. Remove the lid and increase the heat to medium-high. Cook, stirring frequently, until the liquid has evaporated and a brown patina has started to form on the bottom of the pot, about 15 minutes. Add 2 tablespoons water and scrape the browned coating from the bottom of the pot. Shake the pot to distribute the onions evenly over the bottom and cook, shaking occasionally, until the liquid evaporates and the browned coating starts to build up again, about 5 minutes longer. Add 2 more tablespoons water and repeat, allowing the coating to build up and scraping it off, then repeat two more times. By this point, the onions should be a deep brown. If not, continue the deglazing and stirring process until the desired color is reached.","ingredient_lines":[]},{"instruction":"3. Add the sherry, chicken stock, bay leaves, and thyme, bring to a boil, and reduce to a simmer. Simmer, uncovered, until the liquid is deeply flavored and slightly reduced, about 15 minutes. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Discard the bay leaves and thyme.","ingredient_lines":[{"raw_ingredient_text":"1/4 cup dry sherry"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"6 cups homemade or low-sodium canned chicken stock"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"2 bay leaves"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"6 to 8 sprigs fresh thyme"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"Freshly ground black pepper"}]}]}
